title: Frontend Engineer
responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in react, javascript, typescript, html, css. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: MetricWave is hiring a middle frontend engineer to support building responsive product interfaces and reusable UI components.
raw_text: Vacancy V011: Frontend Engineer at MetricWave. Location: Odesa. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 2.6 years. Required skills: react, javascript, typescript, html, css, jest, cypress, tailwind. Optional skills: storybook, figma. Responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility.
